name: protothon-p3
description: ## Project Structure ``` reviewguard/ ├── backend/ │   ├── app.py              ← FastAPI REST API │   ├── train_model.py      ← ML model trainer (run once) │   ├── requirements.txt    ← Python dependencies │   └── models/             ← Auto-created after training └── frontend/     └── index.html          ← Connected frontend ```
